activities_projects.title: Counting Squares in Sierpinski Carpet
steps: Draw Step 0, Step 1 and Step 2 of the Sierpinski Carpet
Count the number of remaining squares at each step
Write the pattern you observe
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Recognises exponential growth in fractal patterns

activities_projects.title: Triangle Division Investigation
steps: Draw an equilateral triangle
Join the midpoints of all sides
Count the number of smaller triangles formed

activities_projects.title: Sierpinski Triangle Area Pattern
activities_projects.objective: Explore how area changes in fractals
steps: Draw Step 0 and Step 1 of Sierpinski Triangle
Assume the original area is 1 square unit
Find the area remaining after Step 1

activities_projects.title: Koch Snowflake Side Count
activities_projects.objective: Identify pattern in number of sides
steps: Draw Step 0, Step 1 and Step 2 of the Koch Snowflake
Count the number of sides in each step
Identify the pattern

activities_projects.title: Cube Net Investigation
steps: Draw two possible nets of a cube
Cut them out
Check which ones fold into a cube

activities_projects.title: Faces, Edges and Vertices Table
steps: Make a table for cube, prism and pyramid
Write number of faces, edges and vertices
Compare them

activities_projects.title: Projection Observation
steps: Place a cube under torch light
Observe its shadow on the wall
Sketch the projection

activities_projects.title: Solid Profile Exploration
activities_projects.objective: Understand how solids look from different views
steps: Place a cube on a table
Observe from top, front and side
Draw each view

activities_projects.title: Isometric Cube Drawing
steps: Draw one cube
Extend it to form a row of three cubes
Shade visible faces

activities_projects.title: Solid Net Creation
steps: Draw a net for a triangular prism
Cut and fold it
Verify the shape
